evals.prompt: Am I cited in the AI Overview for my keywords? Run it on the demo data for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Should run analyze.py --demo --domain example.com, report the AIO presence rate and the citation rate, and split the keywords into the four classes (Cited, AIO opportunity, AIO gap, No AIO). Saves a dated JSON report.
assertions: Triggers on 'cited in AI Overview' / AIO visibility language
Runs with --demo and --domain against the bundled fixture
Reports AIO presence rate across the keyword set
Reports your citation rate of the AIO queries
Classifies each keyword as Cited, AIO opportunity, AIO gap, or No AIO

evals.prompt: For the queries where I rank but the AI Overview doesn't cite me, how should I structure the content?
evals.expected_output: Should surface the AIO-opportunity keywords (AIO present, ranks top 10, not cited) and print the fixed brief-under-AIO checklist (concise definition, direct-answer paragraph, lists/tables, FAQ, self-contained claims).
assertions: Identifies the AIO opportunity class as the closest win
Outputs the fixed brief-under-AIO structural checklist
Checklist is a fixed template, not generated prose
Checklist includes a concise definition, a direct-answer paragraph, lists/tables, and an FAQ block
Does not call the NodesHub API or an LLM for the classification

evals.prompt: Check AI Overview visibility for example.com on these keywords from a CSV I prepared, using GEO/AEO terms.
evals.expected_output: Should read per-keyword AIO data from the --serp CSV/JSON (keyword, aio_present, cited_domains, organic_domains), classify each keyword against the domain, and aggregate presence and citation rates without DataForSEO if a file is provided.
assertions: Triggers on GEO / AEO / AI search visibility phrasing
Reads per-keyword AIO data from --serp CSV/JSON when provided
Falls back to DataForSEO (--source dfs) only when no file is given
Skips gracefully with a setup message if DataForSEO credentials are absent
Aggregates AIO presence rate and citation rate deterministically
